title: U.S. Tech Giants Flocked to the Persian Gulf. Now They Are Targets.
summary_full: Amazon, Google and others struck deals in the Persian Gulf to foot the bill for A.I. development. Iran has now threatened attacks against the companies’ infrastructure in the region.
summary_public: Amazon, Google and others struck deals in the Persian Gulf to foot the bill for A.I. development. Iran has now threatened attacks against the companies’ infrastructure in the region.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran has now threatened attacks against the companies’ infrastructure
